sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105650" key="trugero/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῠγερός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (τρύξ)</foreign> <sense id="n105650.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τρυγώδης</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of lees,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐ τρυγεροὺς τὰ φθέγματ᾽ οὐδὲ γλύξιδας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0499.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyzel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
